response.justification: The candidate demonstrates well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with recent roles centered on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches a rare requirement. Strong testing culture is evidenced by TDD practice, authored test libraries, and testing workshops. Gaps are limited to specific framework exposure (Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest not explicitly named), which appear learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack delivery with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React production work at scale
Direct AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Deep testing expertise: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin and Python are required but not evidenced; Java exposure appears limited
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named explicitly, though general testing depth is strong

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling development
